g.text: IZ Gateway - System Topology (APHL Production / Onboarding)
CDC FISMA Moderate | APHL AIMS Platform | Active-Active: AWS US-EAST-1 + US-WEST-2
Serves live traffic at all times.
Identical ECS Fargate, ALB + AWS WAF,
See US-EAST-1 for full component detail.
Global Accelerator provides two static anycast IPs.
Traffic is routed to the nearest healthy region (US-EAST-1 or US-WEST-2).
If one region becomes unavailable, Global Accelerator detects the failure
and routes all traffic to the remaining active region within ~30 seconds.
All endpoints require TLS 1.2+ (FIPS cipher suites)
mTLS enforced: client X.509 cert required for SOAP/ADS
DynamoDB Global Tables provide active-active multi-region
No separate read replica needed — both regions share the same global table.
Schema: routing table, access control, key/trust store refs.
Flu and routine immunization reports submitted
here via Azure Blob Storage REST API
authenticated with SAS (Shared Access Signature) tokens.
